case_title: BUSTAMANTE, CLAUDIA VS CARRILLO, LUIS ENRIQUE

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SUBMITTED TO JUDGE, IFP.
CASE RESET PER REQUEST OF COURT TO 1/24/05. MS. BUSTAMANTE AGREED PER PHONECALL.
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, DATE REQUESTED 1/25/06 8:30 AM. $10.00 FEE PAID.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUSTAMANTE, CLAUDIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARRILLO, LUIS ENRIQUE $276.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $276.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-24-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-18-2006 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CARRILLO, LUIS ENRIQUE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BUSTAMANTE, CLAUDIA AS TO DEFENDANT CARRILLO, LUIS ENRIQUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-07-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-08-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED ONE DAY ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES. SPANISH INTERPRETER ORDERED FOR PLAINTIFF.
